title: Add team enrichment
description: Read ~/.claude/teams/*/config.json to enrich agents with team name, member roles, model info. Display team label in agent list and detail panel. Match agents to team members by correlating /proc cmdline args with team config.
close_reason: Team enrichment via team.go + LoadTeamConfigs/EnrichWithTeams; todo display via todo.go + LoadTodos + renderTodo in view.go

title: Add detail panel
description: Right-side detail panel using viewport.Model. Shows: pane target, agent name/role, status, cwd. Captures last 20 lines of selected agent pane output via tmux capture-pane. Refresh capture on cursor move and each poll cycle. Split layout: left panel (agent list) | right panel (detail). Responsive to terminal width.
close_reason: Already implemented in update.go (updateFilter, rebuildItems) and view.go (renderDetailPanel, renderDetail) with viewport scrolling

title: Add tmux keybinding to dotfiles
description: Add C-space C-d toggle keybinding to dotfiles repo config/tmux/config/keybindings.conf: bind-key C-d if-shell '[ "\#{session_name}" = "dashboard" ]' 'switch-client -l' 'switch-client -t dashboard'. This is in the dotfiles repo, not this repo.
close_reason: Added C-space C-d toggle keybinding to ~/.config/tmux/config/keybindings.conf

title: Add navigation and pane switching
description: j/k and arrow key cursor movement through agent list (skip group headers). Enter key runs tmux switch-client -t session:window.pane to jump to selected agent. q to quit. Esc as general cancel.
close_reason: Implemented in model.go, update.go, view.go, styles.go, keys.go, commands.go — polling, cursor stability, j/k nav, enter/switch-client, q/quit all working

title: Implement tmux client
description: internal/tmux/ package: ListPanes (tmux list-panes -a with format string), CapturePaneOutput (tmux capture-pane -p -t target -S -20), SwitchClient (tmux switch-client -t target). Parse pane format output into structs. ParseStatus from pane title (✳=idle, braille=active). Include table-driven tests for parse.go.

title: Build basic TUI with polling
description: internal/tui/ package: model.go (model struct with agents, cursor, dimensions), update.go (Init returns tick cmd, Update handles tick/windowSize/keyMsg), view.go (renderAgentList with session headers and agent rows), styles.go (lipgloss styles for headers/rows/selected), keys.go (key bindings), commands.go (tick cmd every 2s calls collector). Cursor-over-flat-slice with session group headers. Cursor stability: restore by PaneTarget after refresh.
close_reason: Implemented in model.go, update.go, view.go, styles.go, keys.go, commands.go — polling, cursor stability, j/k nav, enter/switch-client, q/quit all working

title: Commit in-progress work (status.go, display names, jump keys, todos)
Scroll indicators for agent list
description: Show ▲ N more / ▼ N more when agent list exceeds visible height. Track scrollOffset in model, auto-calculate from cursor position, render indicators before/after visible slice. Modify model.go (+1 field), view.go (~25 LOC), update.go (adjust offset on cursor move). ~30 LOC total.

title: Status-based filtering
description: Extend filter to support :idle, :active, :working prefix syntax for status filtering. Optionally support compound: ':idle frontend'. Modify internal/agent/filter.go. ~20 LOC.

title: Reconnect loop on attach
description: After user switches to agent pane and detaches, auto-return to dashboard instead of exiting. Wrap tea.NewProgram().Run() in for loop in main.go. Add switchTarget field to model. ~60 LOC. Depends on DA1 cleanup.

title: [Bug] Team members attached to wrong parent after swap-window
close_reason: Added PID-based tiebreaking in LinkTeamLeads for swap-window scenario

title: YAML configuration file (~/.config/agent-dashboard/config.yaml)
description: Port config pattern from claude-dashboard. Fields: poll_interval, capture_lines, enrichment_lines, log_file. New internal/config/config.go, modify main.go, model.go, commands.go, collector.go. ~60 LOC new, ~20 LOC changes. Foundation for other features.

title: Confirmation prompt pattern for destructive actions
description: Modal confirmation prompt (y/n) infrastructure for future destructive actions. Add confirming/confirmMsg/confirmAction fields to model. Render confirm bar, handle y/n. Modify model.go, update.go, view.go. ~30 LOC.

title: DA1 terminal escape cleanup
description: After SwitchClient (Enter key), clean up Bubble Tea's DA1 terminal capability query residue ([?6c] garbage). Port DrainStdin + cleanDA1 goroutine pattern from claude-dashboard. New internal/tmux/cleanup.go (~40 LOC), modify update.go, main.go. ~50 LOC total.

title: Help overlay (? key)
description: Full-screen help overlay showing all keybindings grouped by section. Add modeHelp to mode enum. Navigation, Actions, Filtering, Status Legend sections. Standard TUI pattern (k9s, htop, lazygit). Modify model.go, keys.go, update.go, view.go. ~50 LOC.

title: Uptime display per agent
description: Show how long each agent has been running. Read /proc/<pid>/stat starttime or use ps -o etimes. Format as Xh Ym. Display in detail panel and optionally in list. Modify agent.go (+1 field), collector.go, view.go. ~40 LOC. Depends on resource monitoring (process table).

title: Scaffold project
description: go mod init, main.go with empty Bubbletea program (tea.NewProgram), cmd/dashboard/main.go. Add bubbletea and lipgloss dependencies. Verify with go build.
close_reason: Project scaffolded: cmd/dashboard/main.go, internal/tui/{model,update,view}.go, bubbletea+lipgloss+bubbles deps added, builds clean

title: Async/cached collection pipeline
description: Cache process table and team configs across polls. Only re-fetch what changed. Team configs cached with file mtime check. Process table fetched once, shared between resource monitoring and status enrichment. New internal/agent/cache.go (~60 LOC), modify collector.go. ~100 LOC total.

title: Resource monitoring (CPU/memory via BFS process tree)
description: Port internal/monitor/process.go from claude-dashboard. Single ps -eo pid,ppid,%cpu,%mem,args call + BFS aggregation per agent PID. Add CPU/Memory fields to Agent struct, display in detail panel. New internal/monitor/process.go (~90 LOC), modify agent.go, collector.go, view.go. Highest-value missing feature.

title: Flexible column layout in agent list
description: Replace fixed-width fmt.Sprintf row rendering with flex columns that adapt to terminal width. Define columns: # (3), Status icon (2), Name (flex), Team (15 optional), Status Detail (flex), CWD (truncated). Port truncate/truncatePath helpers from claude-dashboard. Modify view.go, styles.go. ~80 LOC changes.

title: [Bug] Team members attached to wrong parent when multiple agents share a session
Add todo display
description: internal/agent/todo.go: parse ~/.claude/todos/*.json files. Display todos in detail panel below metadata: checkmark for completed, bullet for pending, spinner-style for in_progress. Match todos to agents by session/context if possible.
close_reason: Team enrichment via team.go + LoadTeamConfigs/EnrichWithTeams; todo display via todo.go + LoadTodos + renderTodo in view.go

title: Add filter search
description: / key enters filter mode using textinput.Model. Filters agent list by substring match on agent name, session name, cwd, or team name. Esc clears filter and exits filter mode. Cursor resets to first visible item when filter changes.
close_reason: Already implemented in update.go (updateFilter, rebuildItems) and view.go (renderDetailPanel, renderDetail) with viewport scrolling

title: Implement agent collector
description: internal/agent/ package: Agent, AgentStatus, SessionGroup types. Collect() orchestrates: call tmux.ListPanes, filter pane_current_command matching claude/codex/semver, enrich from /proc/<pid>/cmdline (extract --team-name, --agent-name), group by session name. filter.go for substring match on name/session/path. Include table-driven tests for collector and filter.
